changelogHtml:
Version 1.0.0-alpha04

August 24, 2022

As of 1.0.0-alpha04, androidx.health:health-connect-client was migrated to androidx.health.connect:connect-client. For future, releases please use androidx.health.connect:connect-client and the associated release notes on our Health Connect page.

To migrate, simply change your dependency import from androidx.health:health-connect-client:1.0.0-alpha03 to androidx.health.connect:connect-client:1.0.0-alpha04.
